subcodes.title: Words to Miss Rogers, spoken on 1909-07-05
subcodes.first_line: This is the third time you have been here. It has been a great pleasure for you... Man must always associate with those from whom he can get light or be with those to whom he can give light.
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @bringing forth results; fruit, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God
